name: Batter Fried Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ready-made pancake batter with enough water to make a thick batter.
2. Slice the zucchini about 1/8 inch thick.
3. Heat oil in a pan until hot but not smoking.
4. Dip each zucchini slice into the batter, then fry on each side until golden brown.
5. Salt while you drain.
Make double batches because they will be eaten as you fry.
